name: Deckerdramon

signature_move.name: Deckerdra-launcher
signature_move.description: Launches a swarm of anti-aircraft missiles from itsDeckerdra-launcher.

description: Deckerdramon can be said to be a natural enemy of all Flying Digimon. With the terrifying " Deckerdra-Launcher " equipped on its back, it also conceals the ability to shoot down any kind of Flying Digimon with a variety of anti-aircraft missiles. It also poses difficulties for flying-type Digimon, in that its low height makes it hard to detect from high altitudes. Its aircraft kill-rate swells particularly while it is in terrain filled with obstacles, where it is difficult to discern the source of its attacks. In terrain with few obstacles, Deckerdramon spreads a smokescreen from its smoke-producing fangs ( Smoky Fang ), and prepares to attack. It doesn't just specialize in anti-aircraft attacks; in ground-to-ground combat, a mighty blow of its " Heavy Tailhook " pulverizes the enemy.
